visual_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a white collared shirt. He has a serious and concerned expression as he looks down and to his left. The background is out of focus, suggesting an indoor setting. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's subtle movements. A man speaks in a serious and slightly frustrated tone, his voice low and steady. He sounds like he's in the middle of a tense discussion, conveying a sense of impasse as he says, "密码锁着，还是电脑部的同事又解不开。" (The password is locked, or the colleague from the IT department can't figure it out again?). The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing a second man sitting next to the first. This man, also in a white uniform with epaulets, looks at the first man with a worried and questioning expression. The first man continues to look down, his expression unchanged. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The shot is a medium close-up, framing both men from the chest up. The background is still blurred, keeping the focus on the interaction between the two individuals
